member.name: T:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDatabase
member.summary: Bridges between YAML-defined stat manifests and live performance data sources. Games provide an instance and optionally an for game-level stats (coins, food, etc.).

member.name: M:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDatabase.RegisterCustomStat(System.String,System.Func{System.Double})
member.summary: Registers a custom stat with a value getter.

member.name: M:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDatabase.GetStats(System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Returns all stats that match the given filters.

member.name: M:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDatabase.GetCategories
member.summary: Returns all categories present in the loaded definitions.

member.name: T:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatValue
member.summary: Runtime value for a stat definition.

member.name: M:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatValue.#ctor(MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDefinition,System.Double)
member.summary: Runtime value for a stat definition.

member.name: T:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDefinition
member.summary: Defines a single stat that Telemetry can display. Loaded from telemetry_stats.yaml alongside TelemetryConfiguration.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDefinition.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier, e.g. "frames_per_second", "economy_balance".

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDefinition.DisplayName
member.summary: Human-readable name shown in the panel.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDefinition.Category
member.summary: Category for grouping: performance, economy, simulation, debug.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDefinition.ShowInPanel
member.summary: Whether to show this stat in the player-facing panel.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDefinition.DevOnly
member.summary: Only visible in dev builds when true.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.GameStatDefinition.ValueFormat
member.summary: Format string for the value, e.g. "{0:F1} ms", "${0:N0}".

member.name: T:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for the Telemetry plugin — loaded from YAML or another backend. Lives in Core so it is engine-agnostic and reusable across all games.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration.ToggleKey
member.summary: Key to toggle the in-game panel. Default: F3.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration.HistorySize
member.summary: Number of historical ticks to keep for sparklines.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration.CriticalThresholdMs
member.summary: Minimum ms per tick before a system bar turns red.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration.AutoShowOnCritical
member.summary: Automatically show the panel when CriticalThresholdMs is exceeded.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration.PanelOffsetX
member.summary: Panel horizontal offset from the top-left corner in pixels.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration.PanelOffsetY
member.summary: Panel vertical offset from the top-left corner in pixels.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration.PanelWidth
member.summary: Width of the panel in pixels.

member.name: P:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration.Stats
member.summary: Stats to surface in the panel — loaded from telemetry_stats.yaml.

member.name: T:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfigurationLoader
member.summary: Loads and from YAML. Uses YamlDotNet for parsing. Path resolution is delegated to the caller so callers can use their own content-root conventions.

member.name: M:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfigurationLoader.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the telemetry configuration from a YAML file.

member.name: M:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfigurationLoader.LoadFromYaml(System.String)
member.summary: Loads configuration from a YAML string (useful for embedded configs).

member.name: M:MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfigurationLoader.Save(MoonBark.Telemetry.Core.TelemetryConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Saves configuration to a YAML file.
